name: Shan Gui II: Sweet Osmanthus II
short_description: Autumn goes by, girls are still waiting till osmanthus blooming.
detailed_description:
Continuity Recommendations

Considering the continuity of the story, we do not recommend a separate purchase for players who have not cleared Shan Gui and Bai Qu.


About the Game

As the autumn comes, sweet osmanthus's fragrant is pervading Zijin Mountain again.
This is an AVG game produced by Magenta Factory, follow the storyline of Shan Gui and Bai Qu, with an innovative comic book style display.
The Episode 1 & 2 of the game now published.
The whole story tells about He Jia and Han Hui's reunion, in the sweet and mild autumn season.
You will be guided by the girls, once again, enjoy a fantastic autumn journey of the ancient Chinese city of Nanjing.

Key Features

  • AVG in manga-style
  • Very attractive BGM
  • With only one end
  • A relax and gentle story

Character Voice

  • Han Hui - Luttefair
  • He Jia - Yinshuijing
  • Li Qiucheng - Zuoye Yangguang
  • He Ren - Cotton Candy
  • He Dai - Linglixin
  • Chen Kongling - Kagamikuma
  • Eryue Lan - Xinyue Bingbing　
  • Floral Goddess - Xiange
  • Rivulet Nymph - Zisu Jiuyue
